body:
## Summary
- Reformat the badge table to the shared CliMA layout (Documentation / Version / License / Tests / Code Coverage / Downloads / DOI)
- Add stable-docs, JuliaHub version, and License badges; drop the separate "Docs Build" row; normalize the Downloads badge
- Rewrite the body (it was *very* stale): concise intro, feature list, runnable Quick Example, documentation links, ecosystem integration, and a Contributing section (dev-guides + AGENTS.md). Drops the outdated blurb and the WeakValueDicts legacy note.
- Refresh LICENSE and NOTICE copyright to `2021-2026 California Institute of Technology (Climate Modeling Alliance)`
- Adds new logo
title: Standardize README and refresh copyright

body:
## Summary
- The `Unit Tests` workflow only triggered on `pull_request`, so the README CI badge showed the status of the latest PR run on any branch — currently a failing run from an unrelated PR branch.
- Add a `push` trigger for `main` so the workflow runs on the default branch, and move the `tags: '*'` filter to `push` (tag filters have no effect under `pull_request`).
- Pin the README badge and its link to `?branch=main` so it tracks main only.
title: Run Unit Tests on pushes to main and pin CI badge to main
